chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-1989 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 21.01.2026 M/s Abdul Naeem Pirzada, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ali Raza Balouch, Additional A.G along with Shuja Muhammad Phul, XEN Education Works Sukkur, Rashid Hussain Executive Engineer Education Works Division Nousharoferoze and Muhammad Ramzan Buriro, Superintendent Engineer Education Works Circle Sukkur..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Compliance statement has been filed by Secretary to Government of Sindh School Education & Literacy Department/ Respondent No.1, which states that works are under way for rehabilitation of subject school. Executive Engineer Education Works Division Nousharo Feroze/ Respondent No.4, has also filed statement, NIT dated 10.12.2025, was issued to include works at subject school and same is under process. Aforesaid reports reflect that efforts are under way for rehabilitation of Government Boys Primary School (GBPS) Gajra Sahita. Therefore, purpose of the petition has been served. Same is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
